taskSummary: Move Study session and participant consent routes onto GOV.UK/Nunjucks layouts with D1-backed data access and browser-comment refinements.
implementationHighlights: Removed the participant consent Back to Study action and updated route-state contracts so it does not return.
Addressed Codex review comments for session API credentials, D1-empty Airtable consent fallback and legacy sid no longer being treated as a session-note id.
Updated D1 migration ordering documentation so the next main migration prefix is 0024.
Fixed manual visual walkthrough CI waits to use the current participant consent route, visible page-state containers and the operational participant fixture id.

validation.result: passed with 272 tests passing and 0 failing

validation.evidence: Loaded participant consent verified at 641px viewport with aligned radio row, stacked tag gap and withdrawal checkbox label margin-top -5px.
